candidates.title: Anthropic Sues Pentagon Over 'Supply Chain Risk' Designation
candidates.description: Anthropic filed a federal lawsuit challenging the Pentagon's designation of the company as a 'supply chain risk.' This is the first time an AI lab has sued the US government over national security classification, escalating the confrontation between frontier AI companies and military oversight. The suit argues the designation was made without due process and threatens the company's ability to operate.

sources.label: NYT - Anthropic Sues Department of Defense

candidates.significance: First AI lab to sue the US government over a national security designation. Sets major precedent for government leverage over AI companies and the legal limits of military oversight of the AI industry.

candidates.title: Yann LeCun's AI Startup Raises $1B+ in Europe's Largest Seed Round
candidates.description: The AI startup founded by Yann LeCun (former Meta AI chief) raised over $1 billion in what is being called Europe's largest-ever seed funding round, with a $3.5 billion valuation. Investors include Toyota Group and Nvidia. The round signals massive capital flowing to alternative AI approaches outside the dominant US-based frontier labs.

sources.label: NYT - Former Meta AI Chief's Start-Up Valued at $3.5B

candidates.significance: Largest seed round in European history, led by a Turing Award winner who has publicly critiqued the dominant LLM paradigm. Signals both the scale of AI investment and the emergence of credible alternatives to the transformer-scaling consensus.

candidates.title: OpenAI Acquires Promptfoo to Build AI Security Into Enterprise Platform
candidates.description: OpenAI announced the acquisition of Promptfoo, an AI security and red-teaming platform used by 25% of Fortune 500 companies. The tool will be integrated into OpenAI Frontier, their enterprise platform for AI coworkers. Signals the maturation of AI security as a critical enterprise requirement.
candidates.significance: OpenAI's first acquisition of a security-focused company reflects the industry shift from capability racing to enterprise trust and safety. Promptfoo's open-source red-teaming tools were widely adopted, making this an acqui-hire that consolidates security tooling.

candidates.title: Microsoft Integrates Anthropic's Claude Cowork Into Copilot
candidates.description: Microsoft announced it is bringing Anthropic's Claude Cowork feature into Microsoft Copilot, built in close collaboration with Anthropic. The integration enables Copilot to perform long-running, multi-step agentic tasks. This deepens the Anthropic-Microsoft relationship beyond Amazon's exclusive cloud deal.

sources.label: The Verge - Microsoft bringing Claude Cowork to Copilot

candidates.significance: Signals a new competitive dynamic where Microsoft works with both OpenAI AND Anthropic, diluting exclusive partnerships. Shows the agentic AI race is pushing strange bedfellows together.

questionUpdates.newEvidence: A $1B+ seed round for a startup by a researcher who critiques the dominant paradigm suggests capital is flowing to alternative approaches, not just scaling the existing one. The bubble may be diversifying rather than popping.
